name: Class Notes
description: A structured template for capturing notes during lectures, workshops, university classes, online courses, training sessions, bootcamps and educational presentations. It emphasizes separating factual class content from personal reflections, questions and future study actions. The template supports active learning, later revision and long-term knowledge retention.
instructions: Record information as the class progresses. Capture concepts rather than verbatim transcription whenever possible. Use the "Questions & Doubts" section for unresolved topics, "Insights" for important realizations and "Quick Thoughts" for spontaneous observations. Summarize the lecture before finishing the note.
preview_markdown:
---
class: Machine Learning
date: 2026-07-01
topic: Gradient Descent
facilitator: Dr. Smith
---

# Learning Objectives

- Understand optimization
- Learn learning rate effects

# Class Content

Gradient descent minimizes a loss function by iteratively updating parameters.

## Key Concepts

- Learning rate
- Cost function
- Local minima

## Examples

Logistic regression optimization.

# Questions & Doubts

- Why does Adam converge faster?

# Quick Thoughts

Maybe compare this with Newton's Method.

# Insights

Feature scaling directly improves convergence.

# Action Items

- Read Chapter 5
- Implement gradient descent

# Summary

Gradient descent is the foundation of many ML optimization algorithms.
template_markdown:
---
class:
date:
topic:
facilitator:
---

# Learning Objectives

# Class Content

# Key Concepts

# Examples

# Questions & Doubts

# Quick Thoughts

# Insights

# Summary

name: Daily Journal
description: A structured daily reflection template that combines journaling, gratitude, mood tracking, accomplishments and planning. Suitable for self-awareness, productivity reviews and personal growth.
instructions: Write honestly. Focus on meaningful events instead of exhaustive logs. Capture emotions, lessons and tomorrow's priorities.

---
date: 2026-07-01
mood: 😊
energy: High
---

# Highlights

Finished Kaggle project.

# Challenges

Felt distracted after lunch.

# Gratitude

Family support.

# Lessons Learned

Small focused sessions work best.

# Tomorrow

- Update README
- Apply for jobs

name: Recipe
description: A culinary recipe template designed for documenting ingredients, preparation steps, serving suggestions and cooking notes. It supports both quick recipes and elaborate dishes while encouraging checklist-based cooking workflows.
instructions: Use Markdown checkboxes for Ingredients and Preparation Steps only. Record measurements whenever possible. Add tips learned after cooking so the recipe continuously improves over time.
preview_markdown:
---
recipe: Chocolate Cake
servings: 8
prep_time: 20 min
cook_time: 40 min
difficulty: Easy
---

# Description

Moist homemade chocolate cake.

# Ingredients

- [ ] 2 cups flour
- [ ] 1 cup cocoa powder
- [ ] 2 eggs
- [ ] 1 cup milk

# Equipment

- Mixing bowl
- Cake pan

# Preparation

- [ ] Preheat oven to 180°C
- [ ] Mix dry ingredients
- [ ] Add wet ingredients
- [ ] Bake for 40 minutes

# Serving Suggestions

Serve warm with vanilla ice cream.

# Variations

Add walnuts.

# Notes

Bake 5 minutes less for softer texture.

name: Resume
description: A professional résumé template for summarizing education, work experience, technical skills, projects and achievements. Suitable for job applications, networking and portfolio preparation.
instructions: Write concise achievement-oriented bullet points emphasizing measurable impact. Prefer action verbs and quantify results whenever possible.

## Presentation

Data Scientist specializing in Generative AI and conversational systems.

## Experience

### AI Engineer

- Built production chatbot systems
- Improved automation workflows

## Skills

- Python
- Machine Learning
- LLMs
- SQL

## Projects

- Multi-agent Note Profiler
- Customer Support AI

## Education

B.Sc. Computer Science

name: To-do List

instructions: Record only actionable items. Use Markdown checkboxes. Update status continuously. Group related tasks together.

priority: High

- [ ] Send email

# Medium Priority

- [ ] Review documentation

# Waiting

- [ ] Client feedback

# Completed

- [x] Morning meeting

name: Weekly Journal
description: A weekly review template inspired by productivity systems such as GTD and personal retrospectives. It helps consolidate accomplishments, identify obstacles, review habits and define priorities for the upcoming week.
instructions: Review the entire week before writing. Focus on trends instead of isolated events. End with clear priorities and improvements for next week.
preview_markdown:
---
week: 27
period: 2026-06-29 → 2026-07-05
---

# Wins

- Finished portfolio project

# Challenges

- Time management

# Lessons Learned

Smaller milestones reduce procrastination.

# Habit Review

Exercise: 4/7

Reading: 5/7

# Metrics

- Applications sent: 8
- Hours studied: 18

# Priorities

- Portfolio
- Job search

# Next Week Plan

- Finish deployment
- Update LinkedIn
